topic.title: First 100 Words
topic.description: Ingliz tilidagi eng ko‘p ishlatiladigan birinchi 100 ta so‘z

questions.exampleSentence: The book is on the table.
questions.question: “the” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: This is a map of Uzbekistan.
questions.question: “of” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: The keys are in the bag.
questions.question: “in” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: The cup is on the table.
questions.question: “on” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: Do you want tea or water?
questions.question: “or” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: The book was written by a teacher.
questions.question: “by” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: Use this word in a sentence.
questions.question: “use” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: If you study, you will learn.
questions.question: “if” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: This story is about a boy.
questions.question: “about” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: It was cold, so we stayed home.
questions.question: “so” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: Put the paper into the box.
questions.question: “into” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: Many people live in the city.
questions.question: “people” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?

questions.exampleSentence: Oil is used in many machines.
questions.question: “oil” so‘zining ma’nosi nima?
